Simply place your cursor where you want the pause, then select the desired duration from the Pauses menu. This gives you precise control over the timing and pacing of the speech. For optimal results, we recommend not exceeding 20 pauses per single conversion.</p></details><details class="bg-white shadow-md rounded-lg"><summary class="px-5 py-3 cursor-pointer font-semibold text-lg">How do I convert text to speech?</summary><p class="px-5 py-3 text-gray-600 text-base">Converting text to speech is easy. Simply paste or type the text into the designated text box, choose the language for the text and your preferred voice style, and click the &#x27;Submit&#x27; button to initiate the process. The text will be processed, and you can download the audio file.</p></details><details class="bg-white shadow-md rounded-lg"><summary class="px-5 py-3 cursor-pointer font-semibold text-lg">How many characters can I convert with the free plan?</summary><p class="px-5 py-3 text-gray-600 text-base">The free plan allows you to convert up to 20,000 characters per month.</p></details><details class="bg-white shadow-md rounded-lg"><summary class="px-5 py-3 cursor-pointer font-semibold text-lg">What are the applications of Luvvoice audio tools?</summary><p class="px-5 py-3 text-gray-600 text-base">Luvvoice audio tools are versatile and can be used in various fields including media production, education, gaming, and accessibility services. They help in bridging language barriers, restoring lost voices, and making digital interactions more human-like.</p></details><details class="bg-white shadow-md rounded-lg"><summary class="px-5 py-3 cursor-pointer font-semibold text-lg">Can I use the generated audio for commercial purposes?</summary><p class="px-5 py-3 text-gray-600 text-base">Yes, you have full ownership of the generated audio files. You can freely use them in your YouTube videos, podcasts, social media content, or any other commercial projects, as long as the usage complies with local laws and regulations.</p></details><details class="bg-white shadow-md rounded-lg"><summary class="px-5 py-3 cursor-pointer font-semibold text-lg">What formats can I download the audio in?</summary><p class="px-5 py-3 text-gray-600 text-base">When you use Luvvoice AI Voice Generator to convert text to speech, the audio can be easily downloaded in MP3 format. This is a very common audio format that most devices can play, making it easy for you to listen to your content anywhere.</p></details><details class="bg-white shadow-md rounded-lg"><summary class="px-5 py-3 cursor-pointer font-semibold text-lg">What makes Luvvoice AI Voice Generator special?</summary><p class="px-5 py-3 text-gray-600 text-base">Luvvoice&#x27;s voices are unique for a few reasons. First, we use advanced AI algorithms that carefully understand what your text means, which results in very accurate and effective voice output. Second, the voices sound very close to real human speech, capturing things like tone and emotion, making it more enjoyable to listen to.</p></details><details class="bg-white shadow-md rounded-lg"><summary class="px-5 py-3 cursor-pointer font-semibold text-lg">Why do I get &#x27;Something went wrong&#x27; error when clicking the generate button?</summary><p class="px-5 py-3 text-gray-600 text-base">This error might occur due to browser extensions interfering with the website&#x27;s normal operation.
